prompt:
This is going into the exec summary of a steering committee deck next week. Can you make it tighter and more exec-ready?

[Data platform modernization — vendor evaluation, Snowflake recommendation, $1.3M savings]

assertions.description: Output contains all four exec frame sections: What matters, Why now, Risk if we do nothing, Recommendation
Output does not mention the 12 evaluation criteria, 14 stakeholder interviews, 47-page document, or 4 phases — process details that don't inform the decision
Output mentions the $1.3M projected savings — the most decision-relevant financial signal
Recommendation asks for approval to proceed to Phase 1 (or equivalent), not a vague next step
Output includes a 'What was removed' section explaining the editorial logic
